name: Code Browser
author: civicognita
description: Source code viewer for dev projects — syntax-highlighted file browser with search

widgets.content:
## Code Browser

Browse project source code with syntax highlighting.

- **File tree** navigation
- **Syntax highlighting** for common languages
- **Search** across all files
- **Git blame** annotations

Open any file from the project to view it with full formatting.

prompts.label: Code Explorer
prompts.description: AI assistance for understanding and navigating code
prompts.systemPrompt: This is a software project. Help the user understand, navigate, and explain the codebase. Focus on code structure, dependencies, and architecture.
